summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now links directly back to Sprout's note in chapter 13, and the closing now carries Gavin's manuscript work through the night so chapter 15's breakfast-side perceptual shift lands more cleanly. Core beats, dialogue, and scene dynamics were left intact.
edits: Reframed the opening line to pay off Sprout's note from the previous chapter.
Adjusted the final sentence to imply late-night manuscript work before the next chapter's breakfast scene.
Kept the existing opening structure otherwise distinct from the adjacent chapter opening.
